request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know? While politicians debate civil defense spending, our communities are already stepping up. In my town, neighbors organized a local emergency preparedness group - no government funding, just people looking out for each other. Why spend billions on bureaucrats when we can build resilience ourselves? #CommunityFirst #CivilDefense
